nodes.name: Schedule: Every 5.5h
nodes.notes: Set to every 5 hours 30 minutes to refresh before 6-hour ML token expiry

nodes.name: Code: Store New Token
nodes.notes: After getting the new token, update ML_ACCESS_TOKEN in n8n environment variables via n8n's REST API, or store in a Google Sheets 'config' tab and read from there in wf-intake.

nodes.name: Sheets: Update ML Token in Config
nodes.notes: Stores new tokens in a 'config' sheet. wf-intake must read ML_ACCESS_TOKEN from here rather than env if using this approach.

main.node: Sheets: Update ML Token in Config
